revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]新しいページ: 「[[鹿児島県]][[高千穂町]]内にある[[建築物]]に関するカテゴリ。 {{デフォルトソート:たかちほちようのけんちくふつ...」

revision.comment: Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats

Text replacement - "]]|version=" to "|version="
Text replacement - "デフォルトソート:" to "citation needed|"
Merge [[Category:宮崎県の建築物 ( by Municipality)]] into [[Category:Buildings in Miyazaki Prefecture (by Municipality)]] via bot
Text replacement - "↵(2025-05-" to " =="
Text replacement - "): (Bot: create category from JA/Wikidata)" to "== "
Text replacement - "): (Bot: add category" to "== "
Text replacement - "): (Bot: update category metadata)" to "== "
Text replacement - "==↵ Category:" to "== Category:"
Text replacement - "This category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on [[" to "[[sn:This category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on "
Text replacement - "This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[" to "[[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on "

revision.text:
==Japanese Content== [[宮崎県]][[高千穂町]]内にある[[Building]]sに関するカテゴリ。
{{デフォルトソート:たかちほちようのけんちくふつ}} {{座標一覧}} ==Local Content== {{citation needed|たかちほちようのけんちくふつ}} {{座標一覧}} {{translated page|1=ja|2=Category:高千穂町の建築物}} {{translated page|ja|Category:高千穂町の建築物|comment=I hope that this gets the right pagename. Probablty unnecessary but I want to get attribution as best I can}} {{translated page|ja|Category:高千穂町の建築物|version=61803283}}
[[ja:Category:高千穂町の建築物]] [[sn:This category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on Takachiho Shrine]] [[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on Amanoiwato Shrine]] [[sn:高千穂町の建築物]] {{Wikidata link|Q27900890}} [[Category:categories missing wikidata]]
[[Category:categories missing wikidata]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:Categories in qq but actually having wikidata but with jawiki]] [[Category:Categories in Categories in qq but actually having wikidata but actually having wikidata]] [[Category:Buildings in Miyazaki Prefecture (by Municipality)]] [[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] [[Category:Categories needing translation of Japanese explanatory text]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese explanatory text to translate to english]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]] [[Category:Original categories]] [[Category:Takachiho, Miyazaki]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories with no enwiki]] [[Category:Categories]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "ategories missing wikidata" to "qq"
revision.text:
==Japanese Content== [[宮崎県]][[高千穂町]]内にある[[Building]]sに関するカテゴリ。
{{デフォルトソート:たかちほちようのけんちくふつ}} {{座標一覧}} ==Local Content== {{citation needed|たかちほちようのけんちくふつ}} {{座標一覧}} {{translated page|1=ja|2=Category:高千穂町の建築物}} {{translated page|ja|Category:高千穂町の建築物|comment=I hope that this gets the right pagename. Probablty unnecessary but I want to get attribution as best I can}} {{translated page|ja|Category:高千穂町の建築物|version=61803283}}
[[ja:Category:高千穂町の建築物]] [[sn:This category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on Takachiho Shrine]] [[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on Amanoiwato Shrine]] [[sn:高千穂町の建築物]] {{Wikidata link|Q27900890}} [[Category:cqq]]
[[Category:cqq]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:Categories in qq but actually having wikidata but with jawiki]] [[Category:Categories in Categories in qq but actually having wikidata but actually having wikidata]] [[Category:Buildings in Miyazaki Prefecture (by Municipality)]] [[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] [[Category:Categories needing translation of Japanese explanatory text]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese explanatory text to translate to english]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]] [[Category:Original categories]] [[Category:Takachiho, Miyazaki]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories with no enwiki]] [[Category:Categories]]

revision.comment: Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q27900890)
Text replacement - "{{Wikidata link|" to "{{wikidata link|"
Removing from [[Category:Qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Text replacement - "[[sn:" to "[[Category:sn_crud|TEST"
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories in Categories in qq but actually having wikidata but actually having wikidata]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories in qq but actually having wikidata but with jawiki]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Cqq]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Original categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Removing from [[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
revision.text:
<!--templates-->
{{デフォルトソート:たかちほちようのけんちくふつ}}
{{座標一覧}}
{{citation needed|たかちほちようのけんちくふつ}}
{{translated page|1=ja|2=Category:高千穂町の建築物}}
{{translated page|ja|Category:高千穂町の建築物|comment=I hope that this gets the right pagename. Probablty unnecessary but I want to get attribution as best I can}}
{{translated page|ja|Category:高千穂町の建築物|version=61803283}}
{{wikidata link|Q27900890}}
<!--interwikis-->
[[ja:Category:高千穂町の建築物]]

[[Category:sn_crud|TESTThis category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on Takachiho Shrine]]
